title: 'ariy'el #0739
definition:
1) meaning uncertain
    1a) (CLBL) possibly lion-like
    1b) (BDB) possibly two sons of Ariel of Moab
nasbUsage:
Definition: 1) meaning uncertain
    1a) (CLBL) possibly lion-like
    1b) (BDB) possibly two sons of Ariel of Moab

    NASB:  lioness of El, an Isr. name, also a man of Moab
